member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource
member.summary: ETW EventSource for Microsoft.Data.SqlClient tracing and diagnostics.

remarks.para: This uses the provider name Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.EventSource and can be enabled via ETW tools such as PerfView, dotnet-trace, or programmatically through instances.

Events are organized into keyword groups (see ) that can be enabled independently to control the verbosity and scope of tracing. Use the singleton instance to write events and query enablement status.

Note: This API surface is primarily intended for internal use by the Microsoft.Data.SqlClient driver. While public, it may be modified or reduced in future versions without following the standard breaking-change deprecation policy.
remarks.example:
Enable ETW tracing with PerfView:
PerfView.exe collect /Providers=*Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.EventSource

Collect traces with dotnet-trace:
dotnet-trace collect -p <PID> --providers Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.EventSource:1FFF:5

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Log
member.summary: Defines the singleton instance for the Resources ETW provider.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.OnEventSourceEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a callback that is invoked when the EventSource receives an Enable command. Can be used to hook metrics or other subsystems that need to respond to EventSource enablement.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.WasEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the EventSource has been enabled at least once. This can be checked by downstream consumers to handle early enabling that may occur before callbacks are registered.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.BeginExecuteEventId
member.summary: Defines EventId for BeginExecute (Reader, Scalar, NonQuery, XmlReader).

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.EndExecuteEventId
member.summary: Defines EventId for EndExecute (Reader, Scalar, NonQuery, XmlReader).

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TraceEventId
member.summary: Defines EventId for Trace() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.ScopeEnterId
member.summary: Defines EventId for ScopeEnter() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.ScopeExitId
member.summary: Defines EventId for ScopeLeave() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.NotificationScopeEnterId
member.summary: Defines EventId for NotificationScopeEnter() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.NotificationScopeExitId
member.summary: Defines EventId for NotificationScopeLeave() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.NotificationTraceId
member.summary: Defines EventId for NotificationScopeTrace() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.PoolerScopeEnterId
member.summary: Defines EventId for PoolerScopeEnter() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.PoolerScopeExitId
member.summary: Defines EventId for PoolerScopeLeave() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.PoolerTraceId
member.summary: Defines EventId for PoolerTrace() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.AdvancedTraceId
member.summary: Defines EventId for AdvancedTrace() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.AdvancedScopeEnterId
member.summary: Defines EventId for AdvancedScopeEnter() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.AdvancedScopeExitId
member.summary: Defines EventId for AdvancedScopeLeave() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.AdvancedTraceBinId
member.summary: Defines EventId for AdvancedTraceBin() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.AdvancedTraceErrorId
member.summary: Defines EventId for AdvancedTraceError() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.CorrelationTraceId
member.summary: Defines EventId for CorrelationTrace() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.StateDumpEventId
member.summary: Defines EventId for StateDump() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.SNITraceEventId
member.summary: Defines EventId for SNITrace() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.SNIScopeEnterId
member.summary: Defines EventId for SNIEnterScope() events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.SNIScopeExitId
member.summary: Defines EventId for SNIExitScope() events.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords
member.summary: These represent logical groups of events that can be turned on and off independently. Often each task has a keyword, but where tasks are determined by subsystem, keywords are determined by usefulness to end users to filter.
member.remarks: The visibility of the enum has to be public, otherwise there will be an ArgumentException on calling related WriteEvent() method. The Keywords class has to be a nested class. Each keyword must be a power of 2.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.ExecutionTrace
member.summary: Captures Start/Stop events before and after command execution.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.Trace
member.summary: Captures basic application flow trace events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.Scope
member.summary: Captures basic application scope entering and exiting events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.NotificationTrace
member.summary: Captures SqlNotification flow trace events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.NotificationScope
member.summary: Captures SqlNotification scope entering and exiting events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.PoolerTrace
member.summary: Captures connection pooling flow trace events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.PoolerScope
member.summary: Captures connection pooling scope trace events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.AdvancedTrace
member.summary: Captures advanced flow trace events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.AdvancedTraceBin
member.summary: Captures advanced flow trace events with additional information.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.CorrelationTrace
member.summary: Captures correlation flow trace events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.StateDump
member.summary: Captures full state dump of SqlConnection.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.SNITrace
member.summary: Captures application flow traces from Managed networking implementation.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Keywords.SNIScope
member.summary: Captures scope trace events from Managed networking implementation.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Tasks
member.summary: Tasks supported by SqlClient's EventSource implementation.
member.remarks: Tasks represent logical groups of related start/stop operations and are used by ETW consumers to correlate scope-enter and scope-leave events.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Tasks.ExecuteCommand
member.summary: Task that tracks SqlCommand execution.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Tasks.Scope
member.summary: Task that tracks trace scope.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Tasks.PoolerScope
member.summary: Task that tracks pooler scope.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Tasks.NotificationScope
member.summary: Task that tracks notification scope.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Tasks.SNIScope
member.summary: Task that tracks SNI scope.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsExecutionTraceEnabled
member.summary: Checks if execution trace events are enabled.
member.returns: if execution trace events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsTraceEnabled
member.summary: Checks if trace events are enabled.
member.returns: if trace events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsScopeEnabled
member.summary: Checks if scope events are enabled.
member.returns: if scope events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsNotificationTraceEnabled
member.summary: Checks if notification trace events are enabled.
member.returns: if notification trace events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsNotificationScopeEnabled
member.summary: Checks if notification scope events are enabled.
member.returns: if notification scope events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsPoolerTraceEnabled
member.summary: Checks if pooler trace events are enabled.
member.returns: if pooler trace events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsPoolerScopeEnabled
member.summary: Checks if pooler scope events are enabled.
member.returns: if pooler scope events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsAdvancedTraceOn
member.summary: Checks if advanced trace events are enabled.
member.returns: if advanced trace events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsAdvancedTraceBinOn
member.summary: Checks if advanced trace binary events are enabled.
member.returns: if advanced trace binary events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsCorrelationEnabled
member.summary: Checks if correlation trace events are enabled.
member.returns: if correlation trace events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsStateDumpEnabled
member.summary: Checks if state dump events are enabled.
member.returns: if state dump events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsSNITraceEnabled
member.summary: Checks if SNI trace events are enabled.
member.returns: if SNI trace events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.IsSNIScopeEnabled
member.summary: Checks if SNI scope events are enabled.
member.returns: if SNI scope events are enabled; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TraceEvent``2(System.String,``0,``1)
member.summary: Writes a formatted trace event with two arguments.
member.typeparam: The type of the first argument.
The type of the second argument.
member.param: A composite format string for the trace message.
The first argument to format into the message.
The second argument to format into the message.

member.summary: Writes a trace event if trace is enabled.
member.param: The trace message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TryScopeEnterEvent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Enters a scope and writes a scope event if scope tracing is enabled.
member.param: The name of the class entering the scope.
The name of the member entering the scope (auto-populated by the compiler).
member.returns: The scope identifier, or 0 if scope tracing is not enabled.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TryScopeEnterEvent``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Enters a scope with one formatted argument if scope tracing is enabled.
member.typeparam: The type of the first argument.
member.param: A composite format string for the scope message.
The first argument to format into the message.
member.returns: The scope identifier, or 0 if scope tracing is not enabled.

member.summary: Enters a scope with two formatted arguments if scope tracing is enabled.

The type of the second argument.
member.param: A composite format string for the scope message.
The first argument to format into the message.
The second argument to format into the message.
member.returns: The scope identifier, or 0 if scope tracing is not enabled.

member.returns: The scope identifier, or 0 if scope tracing is not enabled.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TryScopeLeaveEvent(System.Int64)
member.summary: Leaves a scope if scope tracing is enabled.
member.param: The scope identifier returned by a previous scope enter call.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TryBeginExecuteEvent(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Writes a BeginExecute trace event if execution tracing is enabled.
member.param: The object identifier of the command.
The data source (server) name.
The database name.
The SQL command text being executed.
The client connection identifier.
The name of the calling member (auto-populated by the compiler).

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TryEndExecuteEvent(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String)
member.summary: Writes an EndExecute trace event if execution tracing is enabled.
member.param: The object identifier of the command.
The composite state of the command at completion.
The SQL exception number, or 0 if no exception occurred.
The client connection identifier.
The name of the calling member (auto-populated by the compiler).

member.param: The advanced trace message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TryAdvancedScopeEnterEvent``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Enters an advanced scope with one formatted argument if advanced tracing is enabled.
member.typeparam: The type of the first argument.
member.param: A composite format string for the advanced scope message.
The first argument to format into the message.
member.returns: The scope identifier, or 0 if advanced tracing is not enabled.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TryAdvanceScopeLeave(System.Int64)
member.summary: Leaves an advanced scope if advanced tracing is enabled.
member.param: The scope identifier returned by a previous advanced scope enter call.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TryAdvancedTraceBinEvent``3(System.String,``0,``1,``2)
member.summary: Writes a formatted advanced trace binary event with three arguments if advanced binary tracing is enabled.
member.typeparam: The type of the first argument.
The type of the second argument (may be byte[] for hex formatting).
The type of the third argument.
member.param: A composite format string for the advanced trace binary message.
The first argument to format into the message.
The second argument to format into the message. If this is a byte[], it is formatted as a hex string.
The third argument to format into the message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TrySNIScopeEnterEvent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Enters an SNI scope if SNI scope tracing is enabled.
member.param: The name of the class entering the SNI scope.
The name of the calling member (auto-populated by the compiler).
member.returns: The scope identifier, or 0 if SNI scope tracing is not enabled.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.TrySNIScopeLeaveEvent(System.Int64)
member.summary: Leaves an SNI scope if SNI scope tracing is enabled.
member.param: The scope identifier returned by a previous SNI scope enter call.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.BeginExecute(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Writes a BeginExecute event.
member.param: The object identifier of the command.
The data source (server) name.
The database name.
The SQL command text being executed.
A formatted trace message with additional context.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.EndExecute(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Writes an EndExecute event.
member.param: The object identifier of the command.
The composite state of the command at completion.
The SQL exception number, or 0 if no exception occurred.
A formatted trace message with additional context.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.Trace(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a Trace event.
member.param: The trace message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.ScopeEnter(System.String)
member.summary: Enters a scope.
member.param: A composite format string containing the scope identifier placeholder.
member.returns: The assigned scope identifier.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.ScopeLeave(System.String)
member.summary: Leaves a scope.
member.param: The scope exit message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.NotificationTrace(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a notification trace event.
member.param: The notification trace message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.NotificationScopeEnter(System.String)
member.summary: Enters a notification scope.
member.param: A composite format string containing the scope identifier placeholder.
member.returns: The assigned scope identifier.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.NotificationScopeLeave(System.String)
member.summary: Leaves a notification scope.
member.param: The notification scope exit message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.PoolerTrace(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a pooler trace event.
member.param: The pooler trace message.

member.summary: Enters a pooler scope.
member.param: A composite format string containing the scope identifier placeholder.
member.returns: The assigned scope identifier.

member.summary: Leaves a pooler scope.
member.param: The pooler scope exit message.

member.summary: Writes an advanced trace event.

member.summary: Enters an advanced scope.

member.returns: The assigned scope identifier.

member.summary: Leaves an advanced scope.

member.summary: Writes an advanced trace binary event.
member.param: The advanced trace binary message.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventSource.SNIScopeEnter(System.String)
member.summary: Enters an SNI scope.
member.param: A composite format string containing the scope identifier placeholder.
member.returns: The assigned scope identifier.

member.summary: Leaves an SNI scope.
member.param: The SNI scope exit message.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.EventType
member.summary: Constants for event type labels used in formatted event messages.
member.remarks: These constants are used as the eventType parameter in SNI trace methods such as to categorize events as informational or error level.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.EventType.INFO
member.summary: Informational event type label.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.EventType.ERR
member.summary: Error event type label.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientSNIEventScope
member.summary: A disposable scope for SNI event tracing. Automatically leaves the scope when disposed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientSNIEventScope.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The scope identifier.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientSNIEventScope.Create(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new SNI event scope.
member.param: The class name for the scope.
The member name for the scope (auto-populated by caller).
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventScope
member.summary: A disposable scope for general event tracing. Automatically leaves the scope when disposed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventScope.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The scope identifier.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventScope.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the scope, leaving the event scope if the scope ID is non-zero.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventScope.Create``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Creates a new event scope with one formatted argument.
member.typeparam: The type of the first argument.
member.param: A composite format string for the scope message.
The first argument to format into the message.
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventScope.Create``2(System.String,``0,``1)
member.summary: Creates a new event scope with two formatted arguments.
member.typeparam: The type of the first argument.
The type of the second argument.
member.param: A composite format string for the scope message.
The first argument to format into the message.
The second argument to format into the message.
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventScope.Create(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new event scope for a class with the calling member name.
member.param: The name of the class entering the scope.
The name of the calling member (auto-populated by the compiler).
member.returns: A new instance.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.Internal.SqlClientEventScope.Create(System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new event scope with a pre-existing scope identifier.
member.param: The scope identifier to wrap.
member.returns: A new instance.
